name: 室内设计提示词模板库
description: 室内设计效果图生成提示词模板，用于 GrsAI 等图生图工具
quality_enhancer: sharp edges, crisp lines, ultra detailed, photorealistic, professional interior photography, studio lighting, high contrast, high resolution image

现代简约.description: 简洁线条，功能至上，大片留白
现代简约.prompt: 现代简约风格室内设计效果图，简洁线条，功能至上，大片留白，白墙，浅色木地板，无主灯设计，悬浮式吊顶，明亮通透，自然采光，真实比例，sharp edges, crisp lines, ultra detailed, photorealistic, professional interior photography

中古风.prompt: mid-century modern style, 中古风室内设计，1960年代风格，温暖木质色调，优雅弧线造型，复古家具，柔和配色，木地板，经典设计灯具，真实比例，sharp edges, crisp lines, ultra detailed, photorealistic, professional interior photography

common_settings.quality: high quality, 8K, detailed, sharp edges, crisp lines, photorealistic, professional interior photography, studio lighting, high contrast

地面.浅灰亮光砖800*800: 浅灰色亮光瓷砖地面，800*800mm规格，瓷砖纹理，高光反射，sharp edges, crisp tile lines
